title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
friendlyTitle: A big library of AI app examples
summary: A large, actively updated collection of runnable LLM, AI agent, and RAG applications, with examples spanning starter agents, advanced apps, MCP workflows, and production-style patterns.
friendlySummary: This GitHub repo collects many working examples of LLM apps, agents, and RAG tools.
whyItMatters: Builders can clone working examples instead of starting from a blank repo. It is especially useful for comparing agent and RAG patterns, adapting app scaffolds, and learning how different toolchains fit together.
friendlyWhyItMatters: If you want to build an AI app, you can start from an example and change it instead of building everything from scratch.
